name: acss-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins for building applications with @fpkit/acss React components

plugins.name: acss-kit-builder
plugins.description: Generate fpkit-style React components without installing @fpkit/acss. Reference-guided generation with CSS custom properties. Requires only React + sass.

plugins.name: acss-app-builder
plugins.description: Scaffold apps with the @fpkit/acss design system: layouts, pages, themes, forms, patterns. Works with the @fpkit/acss npm package OR generated acss-kit-builder source.

plugins.name: acss-theme-builder
plugins.description: Generate and update CSS themes for @fpkit/acss projects — create from seed colors via OKLCH, scaffold brand presets, update roles in place with WCAG re-validation, and extract tokens from images or Figma.
